= Set up Thunderbird with Gmail =

This article explains how to configure '''Gmail''' in ''Thunderbird''.

== Before you start ==

Make sure you have:

* A Gmail account
* Thunderbird {for win}for Windows{/for}{for mac}for Mac{/for} installed
* An internet connection

== Steps ==

# Open Thunderbird and go to {menu Account Settings}.
# Click {button Add Account}.
## Choose '''Email''' as the account type.
## Enter your address and press {key Enter}.
# Your configuration file is at {filepath profiles.ini}.

{note}You may need an [https://support.google.com/accounts/answer/185833 app password] for older clients.{/note}

{warning}Do not share your password with anyone.{/warning}

See also [[Thunderbird and Gmail|the Gmail overview]] and the screenshot [[Image:gmail-settings.png|width=400]].

[[Template:Gmailwarning]]

----

==== Server details ====

Use <code>imap.gmail.com</code> as the incoming server. When prompted, press <u>OK</u>.
